query: SELECT challenge_id, user_id, day, boost_id, COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count, SUM(points_awarded) AS total_points FROM boost_wins GROUP BY challenge_id, user_id, day, boost_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY duplicate_count DESC, day DESC; SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_boost_win_rows FROM boost_wins; SELECT day, boost_id, COUNT(*) AS winner_rows FROM boost_wins GROUP BY day, boost_id ORDER BY day DESC, boost_id ASC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT challenge_id, user_id, day, boost_id, COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count, SUM(points_awarded) AS total_points FROM boost_wins GROUP BY challenge_id, user_id, day, boost_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY duplicate_count DESC, day DESC; SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_boost_win_rows FROM boost_wins; SELECT day, boost_id, COUNT(*) AS winner_rows FROM boost_wins GROUP BY day, boost_id ORDER BY day DESC, boost_id ASC LIMIT 30;
